subcodes.first_line: Render praise unto God, for thou hast quaffed from the Kawthar of His love and through the breeze of His grace hast been roused from the slumber of heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن خدا را که از کوثر حبش آشامیدی و از نسیم عنایتش از خواب غفلت سر برداشتی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
